final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: editorial photo
Asset type: travel brochure hero shot
Primary request: tropical resort infinity pool overlooking the ocean with lounge chairs, umbrellas, and palm trees
Scene/backdrop: coastal infinity pool deck with panoramic ocean view, clear horizon line where pool meets sea
Subject: sleek infinity pool with turquoise water, white lounge chairs with striped cushions, large canvas umbrellas, tall coconut palms
Style/medium: high-saturation travel photography, resort editorial
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, slightly elevated angle capturing pool-to-ocean continuity
Lighting/mood: bright midday sun, crisp shadows, vacation bliss atmosphere
Color palette: vivid turquoise water + deep ocean blue + crisp white + lush palm green + sky blue with fluffy white clouds
Materials/textures: glossy pool tiles, smooth sun-bleached wood deck, woven rattan furniture, glossy palm fronds
Constraints: maintain high color saturation throughout, keep pool edge aligned with ocean horizon
Avoid: muted colors, overcast sky, cluttered composition, artificial-looking water
